description_long: This is a rectangular, vacuum-sealed package of Fargello Beef Kofta, weighing 350 grams. The packaging is predominantly red with a gradient effect, featuring a large, bold Fargello logo at the top center. The front displays an appetizing image of cooked beef kofta pieces on a white plate, garnished with herbs and vegetables, set against a wooden table background. Nutritional and weight information is printed on the lower left, while the rest of the package is mostly solid red with minimal text or graphics. The material appears to be a glossy, flexible plastic, typical for frozen or refrigerated snack foods. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and designed to attract attention in a retail or urban food setting.
description: A glossy red vacuum-sealed package of Fargello Beef Kofta with a food image and bold branding. The packaging is rectangular and features clear product and weight information.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Fargello logo, beef kofta food image, and product details on a red background.
description_view_1: Side view with the package's thickness visible and partial food image and branding wrapping around the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by solid red color and the back of the Fargello logo, with no visible product details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the edge of the package, partial branding, and a glimpse of the food image.
attribute_brand_logo: A large, bold Fargello logo in white and red, located at the top center of the front face.
attribute_flavor_indication: Text on the front reads 'Beef Kofta' and an image of beef kofta on a plate with herbs and vegetables.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A small label on the lower left of the front face shows '350gm' and a red icon, but no detailed nutritional facts are visible.
